name: vba-runner
description: VBA execution engine with test runner and CLI tools (analyzer, formatter, parse-check)

scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:bin
scripts.build:bin: esbuild ../../test-libs/vba-runner-cli.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bin/vba-runner.cjs --platform=node --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --define:import.meta.dirname=__dirname --define:import.meta.url=__filename && esbuild ../../test-libs/vba-run.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bin/vba-run.cjs --platform=node --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --define:import.meta.dirname=__dirname --define:import.meta.url=__filename && esbuild ../../test-libs/vba-analyzer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bin/vba-analyzer.cjs --platform=node --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --define:import.meta.dirname=__dirname --define:import.meta.url=__filename && esbuild ../../test-libs/vba-formatter.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bin/vba-formatter.cjs --platform=node --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --define:import.meta.dirname=__dirname --define:import.meta.url=__filename && esbuild ../../test-libs/vba-parse-check.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bin/vba-parse-check.cjs --platform=node --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --define:import.meta.dirname=__dirname --define:import.meta.url=__filename
scripts.pack: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('../../LICENSE', 'LICENSE')" && npm run build && npm pack
